case_title: PACKARD, ANN VS BROOM DAVID et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BROOM, EMILY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACKARD, ANN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BROOM DAVID BROOM, EMILY DEFENDANT'S NAME IS CORRECTED AND AMENDED TO: BROOM, EMILY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF; 15 DAY WAITING PWERIOD APPLIES; (PD.$14.00) COPY MAILED TO DEF; MOTION GIVEN TO NORA.
PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT: DENIED BY COMMISSIONER. NOTICES SENT TO BOTH PARTIES.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BROOM DAVID
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PACKARD, ANN AS TO DEFENDANT BROOM DAVID BROOM, EMILY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-27-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
